raw_response: {"simulated_user_message":"I kept going back to the canvas, thinking I could make it right, but each time I felt the same hollow. I keep wondering if anyone actually sees my work or if I'm just making noise. After the session, I can't fall asleep, and I feel so alone in this new city. It just feels like everyone else is in sync, and I'm stuck on the sidelines.","problems_referred":["perfectionism","loneliness","sleep_problems","social_anxiety"]}

parsed.simulated_user_message: I kept going back to the canvas, thinking I could make it right, but each time I felt the same hollow. I keep wondering if anyone actually sees my work or if I'm just making noise. After the session, I can't fall asleep, and I feel so alone in this new city. It just feels like everyone else is in sync, and I'm stuck on the sidelines.

parsed.final_response: The city can feel overwhelming when it's new, and it's even tougher when you're pouring your heart into something like your painting, only to feel like it's not being seen. You've been dealing with a lot of self-doubt and criticism, both from others and yourself, and that can be really draining.
